description: Replace all Pexels image IDs in the codebase with verified Nigerian/African fashion photos that match their design titles. Fix the broken hero image (ID 7869226 returns 404). Replace About section image with a fashion designer/seamstress at sewing machine.
steps: Replace the HERO_IMAGE in src/components/Hero.tsx - current ID 7869226 is broken (HTTP 404). Replace with ID 28988327 (verified: 'elegant nigerian woman in traditional attire outdoors' - a beautiful Nigerian woman in traditional dress). The hero features 'Igbo Bridal Blouse & Wrapper' so it needs a Nigerian woman in bridal/traditional attire.

Replace ABOUT_IMG in src/components/About.tsx - current ID 3622614 shows a generic model. Replace with ID 3738088 (verified valid, a woman using a sewing machine - showing a fashion designer at work with sewing equipment, matching the user's request for a designer working on clothes).

Replace all image IDs in src/data/designs.ts with verified Nigerian/African fashion IDs that match each title. Use these mappings: HF-001 'Royal Aso-Ebi Set' -> 29060624 (from aso-ebi search results, Nigerian woman in aso-ebi). HF-002 'Ankara Power Co-ord' -> 10919896 (verified: woman in African fashion with vibrant colors and traditional attire). HF-003 'Igbo Bridal Blouse & Wrapper' -> 33890250 (verified: elegant nigerian woman in fashionable traditional attire, lace dress). HF-004 'Sunrise Day Dress' -> 34625880 (verified: elegant woman posing in traditional nigerian attire). HF-005 'Boardroom Power Suit' -> 33120030 (verified: elegant woman in black traditional Nigerian dress - can work for corporate). HF-006 'Sunday Service Wrap' -> 31880106 (verified: elegant nigerian fashion outfit portrait, beautiful woman in traditional Nigerian attire indoors). HF-007 'Onyx Gala Gown' -> 33762215 (verified: striking portrait of woman in traditional Nigerian dress, exuding grace and confidence). HF-008 'Atelier Custom Fit' -> 33942212 (verified: elegant woman in traditional Nigerian attire). HF-009 'Heritage Agbada (Men\'s)' -> 30075301 (from agbada/men's African traditional search). HF-010 'Adire Indigo Shift Dress' -> 29258125 (from Nigerian aso-ebi/traditional search). HF-011 'George Wrapper & Blouse' -> 28453665 (from Nigerian aso-ebi/traditional search). HF-012 'Senator Kaftan' -> 31485635 (from African man senator/kaftan search).
After making changes, verify all new IDs return HTTP 200 by running curl HEAD requests against the Pexels CDN: https://images.pexels.com/photos/{id}/pexels-photo-{id}.jpeg
Run TypeScript compilation to ensure no type errors were introduced.
acceptance_criteria: Hero image ID is no longer 7869226 (broken) and the new ID returns HTTP 200 from Pexels CDN
About section image shows a fashion designer/seamstress at sewing machine (ID 3738088 or similar)
All 12 design entries in designs.ts have new Pexels IDs that return HTTP 200
All image IDs are verified to return HTTP 200 status from the Pexels CDN
verification: Run curl HEAD requests to verify each new Pexels ID returns HTTP 200
findings: All 14 new Pexels IDs verified to return HTTP 200. TypeScript compilation and Vite build both pass without errors. The About section image (ID 3738088) shows a woman using a sewing machine, matching the user's request for a fashion designer/seamstress working on clothes.
